title: Lotus Blossom
director: Francis J. Grandon, James B. Leong
writer: Charles Furthman, James B. Leong, George Yohalem
actors: Lady Tsen Mei, Tully Marshall, Noah Beery
plot: The inventor of the first clock, which would eliminate the use of the village's sacred bell, is sentenced to life imprisonment by the Emperor, but escapes his fate by hiding with a father and his daughter.
